description: CSS custom properties and var(): a value from :root, a variable aliasing another variable, a fallback for a missing variable, and a component-scoped --brand override that recolors a nested subtree. Default base-14 font so text stays searchable.
visual_assertions: The first paragraph is brand red (#c0392b) with padding from --space.
The alias paragraph is also brand red (variable-references-variable).
The fallback paragraph is green (missing variable → fallback).
Inside .themed, the .brand line is blue (#1f6feb) from the scoped --brand override.
